case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. COLETTE PAIEKA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PAIEKA, COLETTE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PAIEKA, COLETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAIEKA, COLETTE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-10-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAIEKA, COLETTE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-10-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PAIEKA, COLETTE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL- GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
